allow: Bash(powershell -Command '\(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch '\\''Loopback'\\'' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias\).PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch '\\''Loopback'\\'' } | Format-Table IPAddress, InterfaceAlias')
